verses.text: Jew Thukham pen mailam hunah a taktak a hong tungding lim lahkholhna hi bek ahih manin tua Thukham tawh kizui-in a kum a kumin a kipia biakpiakna in Pasian kiang a zuan mite mi cingtaak suahzo ngeilo hi
Thukham zui-in Pasian a bia mite in mawhna panin sian'suahna ngahzo uh hi leh a lungsim uhah kisuan'na lungsim om nawnlo ding ahih manin biakpiakna piak kikkik kul nawnlo ding hi
Tua ahih manin biakpiakna a kipiak simin a kum kumin mite a mawhna uh a kiphawksak kikkik ahi hi
Tua hi a, bawngtal sisan leh keel sisan in mawhna siangsakzo ngeilo hi
Tua ahih manin leitungah Khrih hong pai ciangin Pasian kiangah, “Ganhing leh khawhsa tawh biakna na deih kei a, nang kong biakna dingin pumpi khat nong vaihawmsak hi
Meihal biakna leh mawh maisakna dingin biaknate tawh nang na lungkim kei hi
Tua ahih manin, ‘Thukham laibu sungah keima thu a kigelh bang teekteek mahin keima hih ding nong deih bang teekteek mah a hih dingin ka hong pai hi, Pasian aw,’ ka ci hi,” a ci hi

“Ganhing leh khawhsa tawh biakna na deih kei a, meihal tawh biakna leh mawhmaisakna dingin biaknate tawh na lungkim kei hi,” a cih ciangin hih biakpiaknate khempeuh Thukham tawh kizui-in hih bangin kam na pau veve lai a

tua banah, “Nangma deih bang a hih dingin ka hong pai hi,” na ci thuah lai hi. Tua ahih manin Pasian in Khrih tawh biakna a kipsak theihna dingin ganhing leh khawhsa tawh biakna luite na beisak phot hi
Pasian' deihna bangin Jesuh Khrih gamta a, a tawntungin a kimang paisuak dingin ama pumpi biakna-in khatvei a kipiakna hangin eite khempeuh i mawhna panin a siang ihi hi
Jew siampite nisimin a nasepna uh munah dingin a kibang biakpiakna mah pia niloh uh a, ahi zongin tua a piak uh biakpiaknate in mawhna maisak theilo hi
Ahi zongin Khrih in mawhna hangin khatvei a piakkhit ciangin a tawntunga dingin kimang ahih manin Pasian' taklamah tu hithiat a
Pasian in ama khenuai-ah a galte khempeuh a koihsakna ding hun ngakin a om hi
Mawhna panin a sian'thosak mite, khatvei bek biakpiakna a bawlna tawh siangtho paisuak sak hi
Kha Siangtho in zong hih thu hong theihpih ahih manin
“Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Mailam hunah amaute tawh thuciamna khat ka bawl ding a, amaute sungah ka thukhamte guan'in, amaute lungtang tungah ka gelh ding hi,” a cih khit ciangin
“Amaute' mawhna leh a gitloh gamtatnate uh ka ciamteh nawn kei ding hi,” ci hi, ci-in a na gen hi
Tua hi a, mawhna a kimaisak khit ciangin mawh maisakna dingin biakna piakding kisam nawnlo hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Pasian Kiang Zuanin Kiptakin Om Ni

verses.text: Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, Jesuh hong sihna hangin Siangtho Pen Mun-ah ut utin luttheihna ding thu i neita hi
Ama pumpi mahmah ahi dalna puan tawnin nuntakna lampi-ah i pai theihna dingin amah in lampi thak hong hon'sak hi
Pasian' innsung a uk siampi lianpen zong i nei hi
Tua ahih manin mawhna thu-ah kisuan'na lungsim om nawnloin, tui siangtho tawh i pumpi a kisawpsa-in muan'na leh lungsim takpi tawh Pasian kiang zuan ni
Pasian in piakdingin a hong ciam thu muangngam ihih manin i lametna thu kiptakin len ni
Khatlekhat ki-itin a hoih nate i sepna dingin kihanthawn ciat ni
Mi pawlkhatte in kikhop a pelh bang hiloin, eite in kikhop khawmnate pelhloin om ni. Topa' hong paiding Ni hong naina thu thei ihih manin khatlekhat kihanthawn semsemzaw ni
Thuman thutak i theih khit ciangin mawhna i bawl hamtang lai leh i mawhna a kimaisakna dingin biakpiakna dang om nawnlo a
a kihtakhuai thukhenna leh Pasian' thu a nial mite a kangtum ding meikuangpi bek omlai hi
Moses Thukham a zuilote pen mi nih leh thum in mawh mah hi, ci-in teci a pan' khit nak leh kihehpih hetloin sihna kithuaksak hi

Tua bang ahih leh Pasian' Tapa a simmawh, mawhna a hong maisak Pasian' thuciamna sisan a thudonlo, Pasian' hehpihna a hong puak Kha Siangtho a hehsakte' thuakding bangzah takin lianzaw kan ding ahi hiam
Bang hang hiam cih leh, “Phulakna keima-a' hi a, ka thukkik ding hi,” a cipa leh, “Topa in ama mite thu a khen ding,” a cipa i theih ahi hi
A nungta Pasian' khutsungah thumang loin i tun'khak ding a lauhuai mahmah ahi hi
A beisa huna note tungah thupiangte phawkkik un. Pasian' khuavak sungah na om khit uh ciangin haksatna tampi thuak napi-in tuate na lel kei uh hi
Mipi' mai-ah hong kisimmawhin hong kibawlsia a, tua bang a thuakte na pawlpih ngam uh hi
Note in a hoihzaw, a kipzaw nate a nei na hihlam uh kithei na hih manun thongkia mite thuakpih ngamin, na neihsa uh hong kilaksak hangin zong lungdam takin na om thei veve lai uh hi
Tua ahih manin thaman lianpi a hong ngahsak thei na lungsim han'na uh na khahsuah kei un
Pasian' deihna bangin gamta-in, ama thuciam na ngahtheihna dingun lungduai-in thuakzawhna na kisam uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “A sawt loin, a hong pai dingpa hong tung ding a, hong zekai nawnlo ding hi
Ahi zongin keima mi a thuman mite in ka thu umin nungta ding uh a, a nungkik a om uh leh tua mite tungah ka lungkim kei ding hi,” na ci hi
Eite pen nungkikin a maimang mite ihi kei a, upna nei-in hotkhiatna a ngah mite ihi hi.
